label: Platform Access
description: Which platforms each plan can access

label: Competitor Analysis Limits
description: Brand and competitor tracking limits per plan

label: Keyword Search
description: Search by keyword in ad text/title

label: Text in Image (OCR)
description: Search by text detected in ad images

label: Brand Detection
description: Search by brand/logo detected in images

label: Object Detection
description: Search by objects detected in images

label: Celebrity Detection
description: Search by celebrities detected in images

label: HTML Content Search
description: Search within landing page HTML content

label: Age
description: Filter ads by target age range

label: Ad Type
description: Filter by ad type (image, video, carousel, etc.)

label: E-commerce
description: Filter by e-commerce platform (Shopify, WooCommerce, etc.)

label: Sort by Ad Budget
description: Sort results by estimated ad budget

label: Post Date
description: Filter by when ad was posted

label: Last Seen
description: Filter by when ad was last detected

label: Ad Seen Between
description: Filter by ad seen between date range

label: Projects Section Access
description: Controls which plans can access the All Projects section

label: Plan Billing Metadata
description: Billing type, cycle, and classification for each plan

label: Sort by Ad Running Days
description: Sort results by how long the ad has been running

label: Sort by Domain Registration Date
description: Sort results by domain registration date

label: AI Metadata Filters
description: Intent/hook/offering/color facets from AI-Meta classification (PRD FR-15). Anchor doc only — actual enforcement still lives in the AI-Meta pipeline, not plan_access yet.

label: Keyword Explorer
description: Keyword table/drilldown (PRD FR-16). Anchor doc only — live enforcement is still the allowedUserIds gate in requireKeywordExplorerEnabled(), not plan_access.

label: Advanced Ad Analytics
description: Flat, all-tier analytics depth per PRD FR-4 (supersedes the old Core/Deep/Deepest model). Anchor doc only.

label: Market Trends
description: Beta on all plans today. Access is config.intelligence.allowedUserIds OR this doc's allowed_plan_ids (either grants it — see marketTrends.js and docs/PLAN_ACCESS.md). Flip stage to 'ga' and narrow allowed_plan_ids to Platinum/Palladium to raise the plan-tier bar without touching the allow-list.

label: Ad Tracker
description: PRD-specified boolean entitlement (unlimited on Standard/Platinum/Palladium, off on Basic). No corresponding feature/controller was found anywhere in this backend as of 2026-07-13 — confirm where this lives before treating this doc as authoritative.
